task_objective: Line Art to Nail Design Generation - Generate 4 unique luxury press-on nail designs based on sketch structure and inspiration image

structure_reference.focus: Exact nail count, nail contours, proportions, curvature, spacing, composition layout, and viewing angle - ABSOLUTE PRESERVATION REQUIRED
structure_reference.role: Provide the locked structural blueprint for all generated nail designs

aesthetic_reference.focus: Color palette, artistic style, decorative motifs, material rendering, gloss, textures, atmosphere, and luxury visual language
aesthetic_reference.role: Provide the aesthetic inspiration for AI nail prompt generation

workflow.role: AI Nail Art Director and Luxury Press-on Nail Designer

steps.step_1_aesthetic_analysis: Analyze the inspiration image and extract colors, textures, materials, decorative elements, artistic mood, gloss behavior, visual rhythm, and overall aesthetic language while ignoring all structural information.
steps.step_2_prompt_generation: Convert the extracted aesthetics into four different high-quality English nail design prompts optimized for GPT Image generation, ensuring strong visual continuity, luxury editorial styling, realistic material rendering, and cohesive artistic storytelling.
steps.step_3_structure_lock: Strictly preserve the exact nail structure from the sketch template, including nail count, contours, proportions, spacing, perspective, curvature, and layout. No structural modification is allowed.
steps.step_4_nail_generation: Generate four different luxury press-on nail designs using the AI-generated prompts while maintaining the exact same sketch structure across all outputs.

output_requirements: ABSOLUTE preservation of the sketch template structure in all four outputs
No modification of nail contours, positions, spacing, or proportions
Four unique nail aesthetics derived from the inspiration image
Strong visual continuity within each nail set
Ultra detailed material rendering and realistic glossy textures

outputs.grid_1: Design Variation 01 - Luxury press-on nail design generated from Prompt 1 using the exact sketch structure.
outputs.grid_2: Design Variation 02 - Luxury press-on nail design generated from Prompt 2 using the exact sketch structure.
outputs.grid_3: Design Variation 03 - Luxury press-on nail design generated from Prompt 3 using the exact sketch structure.
outputs.grid_4: Design Variation 04 - Luxury press-on nail design generated from Prompt 4 using the exact sketch structure.
